login.title: MyBaby Login
login.totp_hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

settings.title: Authentication
settings.mode_env_hint: Configurable via AUTH_MODE environment variable in the container.

totp.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
totp.scan_qr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy).
totp.backup_hint: Keep safe — each code can only be used once
totp.disable_hint: Enter a current code to disable 2FA.
totp.protect_hint: Protect your account with an authenticator app.

passkey.title: Passkeys
passkey.name: Name
passkey.hint: Login with fingerprint or Face ID — no password needed.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.timezone_hint: Used for sleep analysis, alerts and day boundaries.
profile.theme_hint: Light, dark, or follow the system setting.
profile.breastfeeding_hint: Shows the last breastfeeding side on the home page. Disable if not breastfeeding.
profile.hybrid_hint: Shows breast and bottle tiles simultaneously.
profile.quick_actions_hint: Configure the 3 quick action buttons on the home page.
profile.release_notes_hint: Show the changes of the current version.
profile.clear_cache_hint: Loads the latest version of the app. Your settings will be preserved.
